name: Boss threatening to fire me after reporting injury in West Valley—what rights?
description: Illegal—document, file claim, sue if fired.[4]

mainEntity.name: Boss threatening to fire me after reporting injury in West Valley—what rights?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal—document, file claim, sue if fired.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Retaliation illegal; protected under workers' comp laws.** Utah/Idaho ban firing for claims.[4][2] Key factors: (1) File comp anyway; (2) document threats; (3) sue for wrongful termination; (4) unemployment available.[3] Report HR/EEOC, keep records, consult lawyer immediately. Protections ensure you get benefits safely.
